text: Really great—my Klingon basics clicked fast, the pronunciation help was clear, and I loved the cultural context around directness.
I really enjoyed it — the explanations made the Klingon feel culturally grounded, and I got to practice the phrases back with enough feedback to feel confident.
Useful and fast. I got the core lines I needed, and the checks were clear enough, though there was a bit more clutter and correction than I wanted.

I got the honor/determination/cultural pride set I was aiming for, and I loved the back-and-forth on nuance and grammar. A few of the Klingon forms felt a bit uncertain or self-corrected, so it wasn’t perfect, but overall it was very satisfying.
Useful and fast. I got the three phrases I needed and the pronunciation checks were helpful, though a bit repetitive.
I got the core phrases I wanted and the cultural distinctions were really helpful, though a few corrections felt a bit inconsistent, so I’d call it a strong but not perfect exchange.
